lessons.topic: Checking in at the front desk - I have an appointment at 10, here is my insurance card
Describing symptoms to the doctor - I have a stomachache, my back hurts, for 3 days
Understanding the doctor's questions - when did it start, does it hurt here, any allergies
Getting blood work and lab tests - you need a blood test, fast for 12 hours, results in 3 days
Understanding your diagnosis - you have high blood pressure, you need to take medicine daily
Asking about treatment options - is there another option, what are the side effects
Scheduling follow up appointments - come back in 2 weeks, call if it gets worse
Filling out medical forms - emergency contact, current medications, medical history
Talking about insurance coverage - does my insurance cover this, how much will I owe
Making a dental appointment - I need a cleaning, my tooth hurts, earliest opening
Describing dental pain - this tooth hurts when I eat cold food, sharp pain on the right side
Understanding dental procedures - you need a filling, we will numb the area first
X-rays and dental exams - we need to take an x-ray, open wide, bite down on this
Asking about costs before dental work - how much is a crown, does insurance cover this
Root canal and extraction conversations - the nerve is infected, we need to pull the tooth
Dental aftercare instructions - don't eat for 2 hours, rinse with salt water, soft foods only
Children's dental visit - my child is scared, is this normal for a 5 year old, baby teeth
Dental emergency - my tooth broke, it's bleeding, I need to see someone today
Calling 911 - I need an ambulance, someone fell down, the address is, please hurry
Car accident English - he hit my car, are you hurt, we need to exchange insurance
Describing an emergency to a dispatcher - there is a fire, someone is not breathing, chest pain
At the emergency room - I fell and hit my head, my child is very sick, how long is the wait
Talking to police at the scene - here is my license, he ran the red light, I was going straight
Roadside assistance - my car broke down, I have a flat tire, I'm on highway 95 near exit 12
Filing an insurance claim after an accident - I need to file a claim, here is the police report number
Allergic reaction emergency - I'm having an allergic reaction, I need my epipen, call 911
Asking neighbors for emergency help - can you call 911, do you have a first aid kit, please help
